data.title: Bask Disc Golf Towel Kaleidoscope 3 2025 Event Innova Sponsored 15x23
data.description:
This towel is from the 2025 Kaleidoscope disc golf tournament, sponsored by Innova — a custom event we put together with original art commissioned from Enero, a street artist based in the SF Bay Area. Bask dual-material construction — microfiber on one side, waffle weave on the other — with full-color sublimated art on both sides. The front features a detailed psychedelic telescope illustration with butterflies and a tie-dye border in pink, blue, and green. The back is the Flip Up Productions logo on a green tie-dye waffle field with purple stitching throughout. Grommet-mounted carabiner and loop included so it clips straight to your bag.

Condition | Brand new, unused
Size | 15" x 23"
Material | Microfiber one side, waffle weave the other
Loop | Yes
Carabiner | Yes, grommet-mounted
Brand | Bask
Event | Kaleidoscope 3 (2025)
Sponsor | Innova Disc Golf

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
